segments.original_text: あのーキングファイターですよね

segments.text: Basically grinding the shield with that sword tip and keeping them away...
segments.original_text: あのーとにかく剣の先端でガード削って近づかせないようにして

segments.text: Well, one thing that's different is...

full_text: Like, that's a spacing-focused fighter... Basically grinding the shield with that sword tip and keeping them away... That's the dynamic, right? Well, one thing that's different is... Oh, right here...
